entries.title: AI Agents Finally Get Access Without the Password
entries.summary: Given free rein, AI agents can research products, compare prices and fill out forms. They’re thwarted the moment a task requires a login. entries.title: Watch. Comment. Buy. AI Powers Live Shopping’s Encore
entries.summary: Live shopping is the television home shopping experience rebuilt for the internet. A host goes live on a platform, demonstrates a product, takes questions from viewers in the comments and offers a limited-time deal. Viewers buy with a single tap, without leaving the stream. entries.title: California Tightens Scrutiny of AI Hiring Tools Amid Reports of Racial Bias
entries.summary: California employers that use artificial intelligence (AI) to screen job candidates face an increasingly complex compliance landscape as state regulators clarify that existing anti-discrimination laws apply fully to automated decision systems (ADS). entries.title: Inside the prediction markets: Malta Drafts Rules as Blockchain.com and Jump Trading Expand Their Reach
entries.summary: Prediction markets spent much of the past year fighting legal battles. entries.title: FIS and Anthropic extend partnership
entries.summary: FIS (NYSE: FIS), a global financial technology leader, is using Mythos 5 through Project Glasswing, Anthropic’s controlled-access initiative that applies frontier AI to help strengthen the security of software supporting critical infrastructure, to secure its own systems.
